_comment: L3 governance plane — MINIMAL and CI-validated, the opposite of ECC's 50KB hooks.json. Behavior is tuned via env vars (MIXTURE_HOOK_PROFILE: off|standard|strict; MIXTURE_DISABLED_HOOKS=name,name), never by editing this file in-place.

PreToolUse._note: Blocks (exit 2) when a SKILL.md violates the routing contract. Active at standard+.

PostToolUse._note: Strict only: after edits, verify every skill stays registered in plugin.json + a profile, has an eval, and the catalog is under the cap.

SessionStart._note: Prints a durable-memory digest to stdout for context injection. See hooks/memory-persistence/README.md.

PreCompact._note: Consolidates + dedupes the durable store before the context window is compacted.

SessionEnd._note: Enforces the store bound (TTL + max), never evicting pinned entries.
